meaning: n.残疾人,身体有缺陷的人adj.残废的
examples: I'm going to work two days a week teaching handicapped kids to fish.
The handicapped also include deaf-mutes and some brain paralysis amentia.
The committee will work toward the establishment of a school for the handicapped.
Handicapped as it is by the politics of the European Union, can it be?
He expected to have a ten-year-old severely handicapped child and her dad on board.
